channel.title: Guide on Darklane Theme Demo
channel.description: Recent content in Guide on Darklane Theme Demo

item.title: Layout/Cell/MD Shortcodes
item.description: Darklane’s layout shortcodes give you multi-column control in Hugo—just wrap your content in simple tags.

item.title: Markdown Guide
item.description: This post demonstrates the standard Markdown formatting features supported by Darklane.
